title: tephrosia sessiliflora
intro: Tephrosia sessiliflora, also known as horsefly bush or tephrosia, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia sessiliflora include its potential to alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, as well as its role in lowering blood pressure and improving digestion. Tephrosia sessiliflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
